caption: A man wearing a large, grey, stylized wig, black over-ear headphones, and glasses is seated in a studio setting. He is dressed in a white button-down shirt with a red bow tie and tan suspenders. He sits behind a professional black microphone, with a wall of framed photos and clothing displays in the background. On-screen graphics include a logo that reads "PODCAST" below a stylized icon and text that reads "BOSS TALK JOT". Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a similar seated position, slightly adjusting his head and facial expression as if speaking or listening. His gaze shifts slightly, and he blinks, while the background and equipment remain static. The overall scene depicts a recording session for a podcast in a room that appears to double as a retail or gallery space.
